findings.description: PascalCase class names `ComponentA` and `ComponentB` appear repeatedly in section s2 content (both XML and Java code examples) but are absent from the hints array.
findings.source_evidence: Source contains: `nablarch.core.repository.di.example.collection.ComponentA`, `nablarch.core.repository.di.example.collection.ComponentB`, and Java usage `ComponentA compA = (ComponentA) SystemRepository.getObject("compA")` etc.

findings.description: PascalCase class name `HelloImport` appears in section s4 content (Java code example) but is absent from the hints array.
